sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Generate core DDL migration scripts for multi-tenant schema including sys_tenants, app_users, student_cards, attendance_logs, sys_promotions, and notification_delivery_logs.
Tester Agent: Author automated migration syntax integrity and schema composite index verification test suites.
Bug Fixer Agent: Execute native SQL migration linter checks, catch syntax conflicts, and patch DDL bugs iteratively.
Documentation Agent: Compile the comprehensive data dictionary, entity-relationship diagrams, and enterprise high-throughput index catalogs.
Coder Agent: Configure pom.xml extensions and application.properties utilizing non-blocking reactive connection pools and transaction boundaries.
Inject core enterprise dependencies including Panache Hibernate Reactive, Kafka Messaging, MapStruct, and quarkus-smallrye-openapi wrappers.
Tester Agent: Formulate dependency matrix verification, environment boot lifecycle validation, and Dev Services wiring tests.
Bug Fixer Agent: Trigger native maven compilation ('mvn clean test-compile'), catch dependency anomalies, and execute auto-patch iterations.
Documentation Agent: Map system execution topologies, reactive pipeline patterns, and automatic Swagger UI route configurations.

Coder Agent: Generate an enterprise multi-stage GraalVM native image container instruction file located exactly at path: `./sources/backend/src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native` targeting Mandrel base images.
Coder Agent: Instantiate strict TypeScript Next.js 14+ App Router boilerplate integrated with next-intl for dynamic multi-locale resolution.
Tester Agent: Author layout validation test targets, viewport navigation constraint scenarios, and localized redirection paths.
Bug Fixer Agent: Trigger node compile checking, identify broken import pathways or component syntax issues, and auto-repair assets.
Documentation Agent: Standardize multi-language folder structures, frontend compilation targets, and Next.js packaging blueprints.
Coder Agent: Generate a production-grade multi-stage Dockerfile located exactly at path: `./sources/frontend/Dockerfile` optimized for strict static Next.js compilation runtime layers.
Coder Agent: Author Next.js Edge Middleware for sequential localization inspection and dynamic SEO alternate hypermedia hreflang mapping generation.
Tester Agent: Deploy mock execution suites simulating distinct browser header states, geolocation vectors, and native Capacitor hardware triggers.
Bug Fixer Agent: Trigger build pipelines, capture TypeScript compilation warnings or edge router rejections, and auto-patch scripts.
Documentation Agent: Chart edge navigation lifecycle schemas, crawl index compliance rule books, and dynamic sitemap.ts generation specifications.

Coder Agent: Construct multi-tenant User domains with automated Hibernate filters, write internal BCrypt matching processors, and decorate resource endpoint controls with microprofile OpenAPI annotations.
Tester Agent: Author unit verification scripts inspecting credential rejections, tenant data isolation boundaries, and invalid token claim blocks.
Bug Fixer Agent: Run java test compiling, capture entity filter validation errors or security claims exceptions, and patch code rules.
Documentation Agent: Formulate system threat modeling graphs, secure authentication flowcharts, and custom claims structural schema layouts.
Coder Agent: Inject reactive security filters intercepting third-party social tokens (Firebase/Google/Facebook), triggering JIT provisioning mutations, and exposing endpoints documented via OpenAPI.
Tester Agent: Build execution mocks validating authentic public signatures against remote JWKS providers alongside corrupted cryptographic injections.
Bug Fixer Agent: Execute project validation checks, catch unhandled signature null-pointer exceptions or reactive streaming crashes, and rewrite code blocks.
Documentation Agent: Compile federated JIT state transition charts, vendor handshake parameters, and data masking log standards.
